meta.description: Debit Note & Credit Note configuration for OIC ERP - Indonesian UMKM context
regulation_references: PMK 65/PMK.03/2010 - Tata Cara Pengurangan PPN/PPnBM atas BKP yang Dikembalikan
PMK 81/2024 - Ketentuan Perpajakan dalam Rangka Pelaksanaan Sistem Inti Administrasi Perpajakan (Coretax)
UU PPN Pasal 5A - Nota Retur & Nota Pembatalan
PER-03/PJ/2022 - Faktur Pajak (as amended by PER-11/PJ/2022)

credit_note.purpose: Reduces the amount the buyer owes to the seller. Acknowledges that the buyer's account has been credited.
credit_note.effect_on_buyer: Reduces Accounts Payable (utang) and Purchase cost
credit_note.indonesian_tax_document: Nota Retur Penjualan (for goods) / Nota Pembatalan (for services)

debit_note.purpose: Notifies the seller that their account has been debited. Formally requests a reduction in the amount owed.
debit_note.effect_on_buyer: Reduces Accounts Payable (utang) and records Purchase Return
debit_note.effect_on_seller: Triggers issuance of Credit Note, reduces Accounts Receivable
debit_note.indonesian_tax_document: Nota Retur Pembelian (created via e-Faktur by buyer/PKP)

nota_retur.description: Indonesian tax document for goods returns between PKP (Pengusaha Kena Pajak). Required for PPN adjustment.
nota_retur.for_goods: Nota Retur - created by buyer via e-Faktur app
nota_retur.for_services: Nota Pembatalan - created by buyer for service cancellations
nota_retur.buyer_effect: Reduces PPN Masukan in SPT Masa PPN (column B2)
nota_retur.seller_effect: Reduces PPN Keluaran in SPT Masa PPN (column A2)
nota_retur.exception: If returned goods are replaced with identical goods (same type, quantity, and price), the return is considered as NOT occurring and no Nota Retur is needed.

reason_codes.name: Defective/Damaged Goods
reason_codes.description: Goods received are defective, damaged, or broken

reason_codes.name: Wrong Items Delivered
reason_codes.description: Items delivered do not match the order/PO specification

reason_codes.name: Quality Below Standard
reason_codes.description: Items fail QC inspection or do not meet agreed quality standards

reason_codes.name: Excess Quantity Delivered
reason_codes.description: More items delivered than ordered, returning the excess

reason_codes.name: Expired/Shelf-life Issue
reason_codes.description: Goods past expiration or insufficient remaining shelf life

reason_codes.name: Price Overcharge Correction
reason_codes.description: Original invoice billed higher than agreed price

reason_codes.name: Discount Not Applied
reason_codes.description: Agreed discount was missing from original invoice

reason_codes.name: Price Undercharge Correction
reason_codes.description: Original invoice billed lower than agreed price (seller issues debit note to buyer)

reason_codes.name: Additional Charges
reason_codes.description: Additional shipping, handling, or service fees not on original invoice

reason_codes.name: Service Cancellation
reason_codes.description: Service not rendered or partially cancelled (uses Nota Pembatalan for PPN)

reason_codes.name: Service Shortfall
reason_codes.description: Service delivered below agreed scope or specification

reason_codes.name: Order Cancellation
reason_codes.description: Full or partial order cancelled before or after delivery

reason_codes.name: Penalty/Late Delivery Fee
reason_codes.description: Penalty charged for late delivery or SLA breach (buyer debits seller)

reason_codes.name: Volume Rebate / Incentive
reason_codes.description: Periodic rebate based on purchase volume thresholds

reason_codes.name: Goodwill Adjustment
reason_codes.description: Seller offers credit to maintain customer relationship

sales_credit_note.description: Issued by seller to customer to reduce amount owed (AR reduction)

scenarios.name: Customer Returns Goods (Full)

debit.name: PPN Keluaran
debit.description: Reverse VAT output on returned amount

scenarios.ppn_impact: Seller reduces PPN Keluaran in SPT Masa PPN. Customer must issue Nota Retur via e-Faktur.
erp_workflow: Customer initiates return request
Warehouse receives goods + inspects quality
System creates Sales Return document linked to original Sales Invoice
Credit Note auto-generated from Sales Return
Journal entries auto-posted (revenue reversal + PPN reversal)
Inventory re-stocked (if goods are sellable) or written off
Nota Retur received from customer and recorded in e-Faktur
PPN Keluaran adjusted in SPT Masa PPN

scenarios.name: Customer Returns Goods (Partial)
scenarios.ppn_impact: Partial PPN Keluaran reduction. Nota Retur only for returned portion.
erp_workflow: Customer requests partial return with reason
Warehouse receives partial goods + QC inspection
System creates partial Sales Return linked to original invoice line items
Credit Note generated for partial amount only
Original invoice remains open for unpaid non-returned balance
Nota Retur from customer covers only returned items

scenarios.name: Price Overcharge Correction

debit.name: Sales Revenue
debit.amount_note: Difference between invoiced and correct price

scenarios.ppn_impact: Requires Faktur Pajak Pengganti (replacement tax invoice) with corrected amount. PPN Keluaran adjusted.
erp_workflow: Price discrepancy identified (by customer or internal audit)
Credit Note created referencing original invoice + reason
No inventory movement (price adjustment only)
Faktur Pajak Pengganti issued to replace original Faktur Pajak
AR balance updated automatically

scenarios.name: Post-Sale Discount / Rebate

credit.name: Accounts Receivable
credit.amount_note: If unpaid; or 1-1010 Bank if refunding cash

scenarios.ppn_impact: PPN adjustment via Faktur Pajak Pengganti if discount changes DPP.
erp_workflow: Volume threshold reached or promotional period ends
System auto-calculates rebate based on configured rules
Credit Note generated with rebate details
Applied against outstanding AR or issued as refund

scenarios.name: Service Cancellation (Nota Pembatalan)
scenarios.ppn_impact: Customer issues Nota Pembatalan (not Nota Retur, because services cannot be physically returned). PPN Keluaran reduced.
erp_workflow: Service cancellation agreement documented
Credit Note created referencing original service invoice
Nota Pembatalan received from customer
PPN Keluaran adjusted in SPT Masa PPN

scenarios.name: Goodwill Credit (No PPN Impact)

credit.name: Accounts Receivable
credit.amount_note: If reducing AR; or 1-1010 Bank if cash

scenarios.ppn_impact: No PPN impact. This is a commercial gesture, not a price correction. No Faktur Pajak adjustment needed.
erp_workflow: Management approves goodwill credit with justification
Credit Note created with reason_code=ADJ-GOODWILL
Classified as marketing/entertainment expense (with daftar nominatif for tax deductibility)
No PPN documents generated

sales_debit_note.description: Issued by seller to customer to INCREASE amount owed (AR increase)

scenarios.name: Undercharge Correction (Price Increase)
scenarios.ppn_impact: Requires Faktur Pajak Pengganti with increased amount, or additional Faktur Pajak.
erp_workflow: Undercharge identified
Debit Note created referencing original invoice
Additional Faktur Pajak or Faktur Pajak Pengganti issued
AR balance increased

scenarios.name: Additional Charges (Shipping/Handling)

credit.name: Miscellaneous Income
credit.amount_note: Or a specific shipping revenue account

scenarios.ppn_impact: PPN applies if the additional charge is for BKP/JKP delivery. Separate Faktur Pajak may be needed.
erp_workflow: Additional charge identified post-invoicing
Debit Note generated with line items for extra charges
New Faktur Pajak issued for the additional amount
Customer AR updated

purchase_debit_note.description: Issued by us (buyer) to our supplier to reduce amount we owe (AP reduction)

scenarios.name: Return Defective Raw Materials to Supplier

credit.name: PPN Masukan
credit.amount_note: Reverse input VAT on returned goods

scenarios.ppn_impact: Buyer creates Nota Retur Pembelian via e-Faktur. PPN Masukan reduced in SPT Masa PPN (column B2). Supplier receives Nota Retur and reduces PPN Keluaran.
erp_workflow: QC inspection finds defective raw materials
Purchase Return document created linked to original GRN/PO
Debit Note auto-generated from Purchase Return
Inventory decreased for returned items
Nota Retur created in e-Faktur system
PPN Masukan adjusted
Supplier's AP balance reduced
Nota Retur sent to supplier

scenarios.name: Return Wrong Items to Supplier
scenarios.ppn_impact: Same as PDN-01. Nota Retur required.
erp_workflow: GRN mismatch detected (items don't match PO)
Purchase Return + Debit Note created
If replacement goods come, new GRN created separately
Nota Retur issued to supplier

scenarios.name: Supplier Overcharged Us (Price Correction)

debit.name: Accounts Payable
debit.amount_note: Reduce AP by overcharge amount + PPN

credit.name: Raw Material Inventory
credit.amount_note: Adjust inventory cost downward (if already capitalized)

scenarios.ppn_impact: Supplier issues Faktur Pajak Pengganti with corrected price. Our PPN Masukan adjusted accordingly.
erp_workflow: Price discrepancy found during 3-way matching or AP review
Debit Note issued to supplier for the difference
No inventory movement, but inventory cost adjusted
Wait for supplier's Faktur Pajak Pengganti
Adjust PPN Masukan once replacement Faktur received

scenarios.name: Penalty for Late Delivery by Supplier
scenarios.ppn_impact: Generally no PPN impact on penalties. However, if structured as a service fee, PPh 23 may apply.
erp_workflow: SLA breach detected (delivery past agreed date)
Penalty auto-calculated based on contract terms
Debit Note issued to supplier
Deducted from next payment or current AP balance

purchase_credit_note.description: Received from supplier, reducing amount we owe (AP reduction) - supplier acknowledges our debit note

scenarios.name: Supplier Acknowledges Return (Credit Note Received)

debit.name: Accounts Payable
debit.amount_note: If not already adjusted via our Debit Note

scenarios.ppn_impact: Confirms PPN adjustment. Supplier's Credit Note should match our Nota Retur.
erp_workflow: Receive supplier's Credit Note document
Match against our Debit Note / Purchase Return
If already posted via Debit Note, just reconcile
If not yet posted, create journal entry now
Verify amounts match

scenarios.name: Supplier Volume Rebate Received

debit.name: Accounts Payable
debit.amount_note: Or 1-1010 Bank if received as cash

credit.name: Raw Material Inventory
credit.amount_note: Reduce cost of inventory (if still in stock)

scenarios.ppn_impact: Rebate reduces DPP, so PPN Masukan must be adjusted. Supplier should issue Faktur Pajak Pengganti.
erp_workflow: Receive supplier Credit Note for volume rebate
System matches against qualifying purchase orders
Inventory cost adjusted if goods still in stock
If goods already sold, credit goes to COGS
PPN Masukan adjusted per supplier's updated Faktur Pajak

fields.name: direction
fields.description: Whether we issued or received this note

fields.name: original_invoice_id
fields.description: FK to invoices table (the invoice being adjusted). Nullable for standalone notes.

fields.name: exchange_rate
fields.description: Exchange rate at note date (1.0 for IDR)

fields.name: ppn_amount
fields.description: PPN amount (11% of DPP, or 0 if no PPN)

fields.name: settlement_method
fields.description: How the note will be settled

fields.name: settlement_invoice_id
fields.description: If settling against a specific future invoice

fields.name: is_settled
fields.description: Whether the note has been fully applied/settled

fields.name: settled_amount
fields.description: Amount settled so far (for partial settlements)

fields.name: faktur_pajak_pengganti_number
fields.description: Replacement Faktur Pajak number (if price correction)

fields.name: triggers_inventory
fields.description: Whether this note involves inventory movement

fields.name: triggers_ppn_adjustment
fields.description: Whether this note requires PPN adjustment in SPT

fields.name: journal_entry_id
fields.description: FK to journal_entries table (auto-generated on posting)

fields.name: original_invoice_item_id
fields.description: FK to original invoice line item (nullable)

fields.name: product_id
fields.description: FK to products table (nullable for non-inventory items)

notes_settlement_log.description: Tracks how each note is applied/settled over time (supports partial settlement)

erp_detection_rules.trigger: Sales Return document created and approved
erp_detection_rules.action: Auto-generate Credit Note (SALES module, ISSUED direction)
validation: Original invoice exists and is POSTED
erp_detection_rules.approval_threshold_note: Configure threshold (e.g., > Rp 5,000,000 requires manager approval)

erp_detection_rules.trigger: Price correction identified (original price > agreed price) on sales invoice
erp_detection_rules.action: Auto-generate Credit Note with ADJ-OVERCHARGE reason, trigger Faktur Pajak Pengganti

erp_detection_rules.trigger: Purchase Return document created and approved
erp_detection_rules.action: Auto-generate Debit Note (PURCHASE module, ISSUED direction)

erp_detection_rules.trigger: 3-way match detects price discrepancy (supplier invoice > PO price)
erp_detection_rules.action: Flag for review, suggest Debit Note creation with ADJ-OVERCHARGE reason
validation: Price variance exceeds tolerance threshold (configurable, e.g., 1%)

erp_detection_rules.trigger: Supplier delivery date exceeds PO expected date + grace period
erp_detection_rules.action: Auto-calculate penalty based on contract terms, suggest Debit Note

erp_detection_rules.trigger: Credit Note or Debit Note involving goods return is POSTED
erp_detection_rules.action: Prompt user to create Nota Retur in e-Faktur system

erp_detection_rules.trigger: Credit Note for service cancellation is POSTED
erp_detection_rules.action: Prompt user to create Nota Pembatalan in e-Faktur system

erp_detection_rules.trigger: Credit Note is POSTED and settlement_method = APPLY_NEXT_INVOICE
erp_detection_rules.action: When next invoice is created for same partner, auto-suggest offset
validation: Unsettled credit balance exists for this partner

erp_detection_rules.trigger: Credit Note is POSTED and settlement_method = CASH_REFUND
erp_detection_rules.action: Create payment entry for refund, debit AR/AP and credit Bank

levels.description: Can approve notes up to Rp 5 juta
Can approve notes up to Rp 50 juta

rules: All notes require at least Level 2 approval before posting
Goodwill credits (ADJ-GOODWILL) always require Level 3+ approval
Notes exceeding Rp 50 juta require Level 4 approval
Rejected notes return to DRAFT status with rejection reason
Cancelled notes after posting require reversal journal entry

body: Line items table: No, Description, Qty, UOM, Unit Price, Subtotal
print_template_fields.legal_note_indonesia: Dokumen ini merupakan bukti pengurangan utang/piutang yang sah sesuai dengan ketentuan perpajakan yang berlaku.

validation_rules.description: Credit/Debit Note total cannot exceed original invoice total
Return quantity per line cannot exceed original invoice line quantity
Note date must be on or after original invoice date
Original invoice must be in POSTED or PARTIALLY_PAID status
Note currency must match original invoice currency
Reason code is mandatory for all notes
Cannot create multiple notes for the same invoice line item + reason without cancelling previous
If both parties are PKP and goods are BKP, Nota Retur number must be filled before period closing
If service cancellation between PKPs, Nota Pembatalan number must be filled
If returned goods are replaced with identical goods (same type, qty, price), no Nota Retur needed. Flag as replacement.
PPN rate on note must match original invoice PPN rate
Note must be fully settled (settled_amount = total_amount) before year-end closing

reports.name: Credit Note Register
reports.description: List all credit notes by period with status, amount, and settlement status

reports.name: Debit Note Register
reports.description: List all debit notes by period

reports.name: Unsettled Notes Aging
reports.description: Outstanding credit/debit notes not yet fully applied, aged by days

reports.name: Return Analysis by Reason
reports.description: Breakdown of returns by reason code to identify quality/process issues

reports.name: PPN Adjustment Report
reports.description: All notes requiring PPN adjustment for SPT Masa PPN reconciliation

reports.name: Nota Retur Tracking
reports.description: Track Nota Retur/Pembatalan status and e-Faktur integration
